text.title: IH Build-Update Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to draft, validate, schedule, and review one IH build-update post.

step.name: collect-three-numbers
step.input: Last 7 days of analytics + billing + retention CSVs.
step.action: Pull 3 numeric signals: pick the most movement-bearing (MRR, conv, churn, retention, signup count). Pin window_days = 7.
step.decision-gate: Less than 3 real numbers available → skip the week per r2.

step.name: draft-tldr
step.input: The 3 numbers + the week's hypothesis tested.
step.action: Draft a TL;DR ≤180 chars, prefixed "TL;DR:". Lead with the most counter-intuitive number + the lesson.

step.name: write-body
step.action: Write body 600-1200 chars. Structure: background (1 paragraph) → numbers (3 short paragraphs tying each to the lesson) → ask (final paragraph).

step.name: set-ask
step.action: Write one ask, ≤220 chars, answerable in <1 min by an outsider. Forbid "thoughts?" / "any feedback?".
step.decision-gate: Ask matches vague-ask regex → reject per r3.

step.name: schedule-tuesday-slot
step.action: Run validator. If green, schedule via IH or a scheduler for Tue 8-10am ET. Skip if no Tue slot this week.

step.name: log-reply-outcomes
step.action: Log reply count, qualified-reply count, follow count. Tag the post into the hook-bank file (one row).
